g.text: 3 AWS accounts · shared regional VPC · per-sandbox Security Groups · SSM-only access
Shared Regional VPC (one per region, provisioned by km init)
No SSH · No default egress · SSM-only access
EC2 Spot Instance / ECS Fargate Task
AI Agent: Goose, Claude Code, Aider, OpenDev, redamon, raptor ...
iptables DNAT: all DNS → :53, all HTTP/S → :3128
No lateral movement in shared VPC
Per-sandbox compute + AI spend tracking · DynamoDB global table · dual-layer enforcement
rates from AWS Price List API
configure → bootstrap → init → create → monitor → destroy · TTL auto-destroy · spot interruption handling
CW Logs poll for last activity
destroy — full deprovisioning, all AWS resources removed (default)
stop — halt compute (EC2: StopInstances preserving EBS; ECS: stop task), state preserved
retain — log intent only, operator must destroy manually
